patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/geo/GeoJSONUtils.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['/**', '* Register of types that are composable when a geometry collection consist only of those types.', '* Key is a type of each shape inside collection, value is a target type to be transformed to.', '*/', 'public static final Map<String, String> COMPOSABLE_TYPES =', 'Map.of(', 'POINT, MULTI_POINT,', 'POLYGON, MULTI_POLYGON,', 'LINE_STRING, MULTI_LINE_STRING', ');', '', 'if (shape instanceof ShapeCollection<?> shapeCollection) {', '/**', '* Convert a WKT string into a Shape.', '*', '* GeometryCollections composed of a single part are converted', '* into the respective multi-part (MultiPoint, MultiLineString, or MultiPolygon) objects', '* to maximize interoperability.', '* See https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-ietf-geojson-03#section-3.1.8', '*/', '', '/**', '* Sanitize a map of geometric values using the same constrains as {@link #wkt2Shape}', '*/', '@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")', 'public static Map<String, Object> sanitizeMap(Map<?, ?> value) {', 'final String[] typeInCollection = {null};', 'final boolean[] sameType = {true};', 'final List<Map<String, Object>> sanitizedGeometries = new ArrayList<>();', 'Map<String, Object> sanitizedShape = sanitizeMap(map);', 'sanitizedGeometries.add(sanitizedShape);', 'String shapeType = BytesRefs.toString(sanitizedShape.get(TYPE_FIELD));', 'if (typeInCollection[0] == null) {', 'typeInCollection[0] = shapeType;', '} else {', 'if (typeInCollection[0].equals(shapeType) == false) {', 'sameType[0] = false;', '}', '}', 'Map<String, Object> transformed = new HashMap<>();', 'if (sameType[0] == true) {', 'String targetType = COMPOSABLE_TYPES.get(typeInCollection[0]);', 'if (targetType != null) {', 'transformed.put(TYPE_FIELD, targetType);', 'final List<Object> coords = new ArrayList<>();', 'forEach(geometries, input -> {', 'Map<String, Object> validatedShape = (Map<String, Object>) input;', 'coords.add(validatedShape.get(COORDINATES_FIELD));', '});', 'transformed.put(COORDINATES_FIELD, coords);', '}', '} else {', 'transformed.put(TYPE_FIELD, GEOMETRY_COLLECTION);', 'transformed.put(GEOMETRIES_FIELD, sanitizedGeometries);', '}', 'return transformed;', '', 'return (Map<String, Object>) value;'], removed_lines=['if (shape instanceof ShapeCollection) {', 'ShapeCollection<?> shapeCollection = (ShapeCollection<?>) shape;', 'public static void validateGeoJson(Map<?, ?> value) {', '', 'validateGeoJson(map);'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/types/GeoShapeType.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['return GeoJSONUtils.sanitizeMap(map);', 'return GeoJSONUtils.sanitizeMap(map);'], removed_lines=['@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")', 'GeoJSONUtils.validateGeoJson(map);', 'return (Map<String, Object>) value;', 'GeoJSONUtils.validateGeoJson(map);', 'return (Map<String, Object>) value;'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
